query:
INSERT INTO citizenDelegates (userId, ministryId, delegateId, delegateUserId, votingMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1 as userId,
  d.ministryId,
  d.id as delegateId,
  NULL as delegateUserId,
  'delegate' as votingMethod,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM delegates d
WHERE d.isActive = true
LIMIT 200
